## Outcome

What user-visible or operational result does this change provide?

## Design

Call out important tradeoffs, schema changes, and compatibility considerations.
List any new dependency and explain why it is necessary.

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run verify`
- [ ] Database-backed tests were run when persistence changed
- [ ] Desktop and 390px mobile flows were reviewed when UI changed
- [ ] No credentials, production data, or local environment files are included
